title: POST /books endpoint implemented
evidence: src/app.ts:13-35 — creates book with title, author, year, isbn fields; returns 201 with created book

title: GET /books endpoint with author filter
evidence: src/app.ts:37-48 — lists books, supports ?author= query parameter for filtering

title: GET /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:50-60 — retrieves single book by id, returns 404 if not found

title: PUT /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:62-90 — updates book with validation, returns 404 if not found

title: DELETE /books/{id} endpoint
evidence: src/app.ts:92-101 — deletes book, returns 204 on success, 404 if not found

title: SQLite database storage
evidence: src/db.ts:11-24 — uses better-sqlite3, creates books table with appropriate schema

title: JSON responses with HTTP status codes
evidence: src/app.ts throughout — all endpoints return JSON with 200, 201, 204, 400, 404 status codes

title: Input validation for title and author
evidence: src/app.ts:15-19 (POST) and 73-77 (PUT) — validate title and author are required non-empty strings

title: README with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md — includes Setup, Run, Test, and Endpoints sections with examples

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: tests/api.test.ts — 8 tests covering health, create, retrieve, validation, filter, update, delete, and 404 cases
